title: MailerLite vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite and Campaign Monitor. See pricing, features, ratings, and which email marketing tool suits your business best.
h1: MailerLite vs Campaign Monitor: Detailed Comparison
intro: MailerLite and Campaign Monitor are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. MailerLite targets budget-conscious small businesses with a freemium model, while Campaign Monitor focuses on agencies and teams managing multiple brands. Choosing between them depends on your business size, budget, and specific feature needs.

comparison_table.tool_a: Freemium (free up to 1,000 subscribers, paid from $9/month)
Small businesses and freelancers on a budget
comparison_table.tool_b: Agencies and teams managing multiple brands

comparison_table.tool_a: Landing pages, pop-ups, surveys, e-commerce integrations, automation
comparison_table.tool_b: Multi-brand management, journey designer, smart segments, transactional email

choose_a_if: You're a small business or freelancer starting with a limited budget and want to test email marketing free
You need e-commerce integrations, landing pages, and pop-ups built into one platform
You value ease of use and beginner-friendly features with strong customer support
choose_b_if: You manage multiple client brands and need dedicated multi-brand management features
You require advanced journey automation and smart segmentation capabilities
You send transactional emails and need professional-grade deliverability features

faq.q: Is MailerLite better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. MailerLite is better for small businesses and budget-conscious users thanks to its free tier and lower starting price. Campaign Monitor is better for agencies managing multiple brands with advanced automation needs. MailerLite has higher customer ratings overall (4.6 vs 4.1 on G2).

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: MailerLite is significantly cheaper, offering a free plan for up to 1,000 subscribers with no credit card required. Campaign Monitor has no free tier and starts at $11/month. MailerLite's paid plans begin at $9/month, making it the more affordable option for most users.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support importing subscriber lists and email data. MailerLite provides import tools and customer support to help you migrate. The transition typically takes a few hours depending on your list size and complexity of automations.
